info.name: VLE API Full Workflow
info.description: Full local workflow tests for the COMP3161 VLE API. Rebuild the local database before a clean run. This collection intentionally creates records.

exec: pm.test('created student can log in', function () { pm.expect(json.user).to.have.property('accessLvl', 'student'); });
pm.test('created user can be fetched', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('userID', Number(pm.environment.get('createdStudentID'))); });
pm.test('lecturer assigned or already assigned', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('lecturerID', 200000000); });
pm.test('created course appears for student', function () { pm.expect(json.some(c => c.courseCode === pm.environment.get('createdCourseCode'))).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('member roster includes created student', function () { pm.expect(json.some(m => String(m.userID) === String(pm.environment.get('createdStudentID')))).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('created forum appears', function () { pm.expect(json.some(f => String(f.dfID) === String(pm.environment.get('createdForumID')))).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('created thread appears', function () { pm.expect(json.some(t => String(t.dtID) === String(pm.environment.get('createdThreadID')))).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('calendar event appears', function () { pm.expect(json.some(e => String(e.eventID) === String(pm.environment.get('createdCalendarEventID')))).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('grades include created course', function () { pm.expect(json.some(g => g.courseCode === pm.environment.get('createdCourseCode'))).to.eql(true); });
